prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约117→129→135→268→438名，整体呈持续后移趋势。2024年吉林省高考改革（理科→物理类）后位次从135名骤降至268名，2025年进一步后移至438名，近两年累计后移约303名，反映该校在吉林省的竞争格局发生显著变化。2025年基准位次约438名；2021–2025年本省招生计划分别为5→8→11→12→15人，持续扩招；2026年计划15人，与2025年持平。扩招趋势暂停，对位次后移的缓解作用减弱。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校，隶属上海交通大学（软科主榜第4名），医学院独立招生但共享交大品牌声誉，属于国内顶尖医学院校层次；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学校管理、师德师风及学术不端舆情；抖音热度为较热（总排名第42位），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上。历史投档异常方面，2021年上海交通大学在河南曾出现投档线异常信号，但医学院层面未见明显断档记录；临床医学A+、口腔医学A+、护理学A-，均为国内顶尖水平。招生专业以临床医学（八年制本博连读、五年制、英语班）和护理学为主，与优势学科高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024年热度指数70.19（推荐），口腔医学72.31（推荐），护理学68.61（推荐），医学类专业整体保持高热。吉林省2026年物理类考生约8万人，与2025年基本持平，考生规模稳定。；上海交通大学医学院位于上海，非本省院校。2025年该校在吉林省招生占比约3.06%（15/490），属中等偏低水平，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平（扩招暂停）、考生规模稳定、医学类专业热度持续高热等因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年438名基础上继续小幅后移。临床医学A+学科对高分考生吸引力不减，但招生计划不再增加使竞争维持高位。预测最低位次约458名，区间403–513名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（学制8年，八年制本博连读）
- 临床医学（学制8年，八年制本博连读，口腔方向）
- 临床医学（学制8年，八年制本博连读，法语班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（学制5年，英语班）
- 临床医学（学制5年）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学（含双学士学位，护理英才试点班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（403–513名）内，建议以二档临床医学（五年制）为主攻方向，一档八年制本博连读专业作为冲刺（需位次明显优于区间上限），三档护理学作为保底。位次在400名以内可重点冲刺八年制临床医学及口腔方向；位次在450–500名建议以五年制临床医学为主，兼顾护理学保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 117 → 129 → 135 → 268 → 438, showing a continuous backward trend. After the 2024 Jilin Province college entrance examination reform (Science → Physics Category), the ranking dropped sharply from 135 to 268, and further moved back to 438 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 303 positions in the last two years, reflecting significant changes in the competitive landscape for this university in Jilin Province. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 438; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans were 5 → 8 → 11 → 12 → 15, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 15, unchanged from 2025. The expansion trend has paused, weakening the mitigating effect on the backward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (ranked 4th in the Soft Science Main Ranking). The School of Medicine enrolls independently but shares the brand reputation of SJTU, belonging to the top tier of domestic medical schools. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management, teacher ethics, and academic misconduct controversies. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 42nd overall), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2021, Shanghai Jiao Tong University had an abnormal admission line signal in Henan, but no significant gaps were recorded at the School of Medicine level. Clinical Medicine is A+, Stomatology is A+, and Nursing is A-, all at the top domestic level. The enrollment majors are mainly Clinical Medicine (eight-year combined bachelor's and doctoral program, five-year program, English class) and Nursing, highly matching the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Clinical Medicine was 70.19 (recommended), Stomatology 72.31 (recommended), and Nursing 68.61 (recommended), with medical majors overall maintaining high heat. In 2026, Jilin Province has about 80,000 Physics Category examinees, roughly the same as 2025, with a stable candidate pool. Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai, not a local provincial institution. In 2025, the university's enrollment share in Jilin Province is about 3.06% (15/490), which is moderately low, so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025 (expansion paused), stable candidate numbers, and persistently high popularity of medical majors, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to continue a slight backward shift from the 2025 baseline of 438. The A+ Clinical Medicine discipline continues to attract high-scoring candidates, but the lack of further enrollment increases keeps competition high. The predicted minimum ranking is about 458, with a range of 403–513.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year program, combined bachelor's and doctoral)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year program, combined bachelor's and doctoral, Stomatology direction)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year program, combined bachelor's and doctoral, French class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year program, English class)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Nursing (including dual bachelor's degree, Nursing Elite Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (403–513), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Clinical Medicine (5-year program) as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 eight-year combined bachelor's and doctoral programs as a stretch (requiring a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and use Tier 3 Nursing as a safety option. If your ranking is within 400, you can focus on sprinting for eight-year Clinical Medicine and Stomatology directions; if your ranking is 450–500, it is recommended to mainly target five-year Clinical Medicine, while also considering Nursing as a backup.
